calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Entering Judgment Against Defendant Pursuant To Ccp 664.6
Off Calendar Oct-03-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Roger Jackson of Michael & Associates (707-318-2994) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB'S Motion For Order Entering Judgment Against Defendant Pursuant To CCP 664.6 is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Plaintiff is entitled to judgment in its favor against defendant Adam Berger in the amount of $11,637.49 plus costs of suit. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order and separate [proposed] judgment that track the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

Notice For Motion And Motion For Order Entering Judgment Against Defendant Pursuant To C.C.P 664.
Off Calendar Jul-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Vivian Lerche, Esq. (415-680-5731) appears specially as counsel for plaintiff/moving party, American Express Bank

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB'S Motion For Order Entering Judgment Against Defendant Pursuant To C.C.P 664 is Denied without prejudice to being refiled. No proof of service was filed.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745. (D302)
